targetJustification.localIncrementalMs: The default 2s target is not realistic for the current 9,255-file / 1.45M-line web program. The pinned native compiler reduced leaf-edit P95 from 97.51s to 4.89s; 5s is the measured repo-specific ratchet.
targetJustification.widelyImportedIncrementalMs: The shared UI source boundary invalidates both @jovie/ui and @jovie/web. Native P95 is 19.99s at fixed four-task concurrency; 25s leaves noise headroom while project-reference work remains visible.
targetJustification.coldFullMs: Native TS7 reduced sustained cold full-repo P95 from 294.93s to 27.99s, so the original 30s default is now enforced.
